purpose: Define the controlled context and disabled executor skeleton for future content writes to D1, R2, website source, or related resources.
hard_rules: Real content apply is disabled by default.
No script may infer permission from a ready content rehearsal alone.
A controlled content apply context must be explicit and machine-readable.
The executor skeleton must refuse to write unless a later real-apply phase explicitly enables it.
This phase installs gate and skeleton only; it must not write D1, R2, source, registry, Cloudflare, git, or deploy.
